titleStmt.title: SII 11.133: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 133. (B.K. No. 122 of 1926-27). KURTAKŌṬI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE TEMPLE OF VIRŪPĀKSHA.

summary.p: This inscription of the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) describes at length the Two-Hundred Mahājanas of Kuṟitakūṇṭe, headed by the Ūroḍeya Vāsudēva-Bhaṭṭa Sōmayāji, their trusted and valorous servant, the barber (nāvida) Dāsa, who built the temple of Dāsēśvara, the members of the Mōriya family who endowed the temple richly and the members of the Kōṇeya family. It registers a gift of one paṇa on every dōṇi by the One-Thousand of Jaragara-Dōṇi, who belonged to the Mōriya family and of oil by the Fifty Families of Telligas (oilmen), for worship, lamp and offerings in the temple mentioned above. A gift of land is also stated to have been made to the same temple by the Two-Hundred Mahājanas of Kuṟitakūṇṭe and by the said Dāsa (Dāsimayya).
The record is dated Śaka 1009, Prabhava, Śrāvaṇa, amāvāsyā, Sunday, full solar eclipse, vyatīpāta. The details regularly correspond to A.D. 1087, August 1, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mā ceṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . kaṁda . sētuhi
mādriyi noḷagaṇa bhūtaḷadoḷnegaḷda śātravakṣatriyaraṁ sātāsiyiṁde tavisi mahītaḷamaṁ vikramāṁkanāḷuttamiral . A
ḍigeṟagi tammupārjjisidoḍamegaḷaṁ taṁdu koṭṭu śaraṇārtthigaḷādaḍe bāḷvarahitavarggaṁ toḍarduḷivare muḷiye vikramāditya nri
paṁ . svastyanēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita mukhakamaḷavinirggatavēdavēdāṁgōpāṁgānēkaśāstrāṣṭādaśasmṛtipurāṇavāgbhūṣaṇa ryya
maniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇa rvviditavēdārtthavidyāpāraga rṣaṭkarmmanirata rssapta
sōmasaṁsthāvabhrithāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīra rpparamaparōpakāriga ḷāśritajanakalpavrikṣarē kavākya ḻduṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭa
pratipāḷakarappa śrīmatkuṟitakūṁṭeyoroḍeya vāsudēvabhaṭṭasōmayājiya pramukhavaśēṣa mahājanavinnūrvvaru .
Ādibrahmasamānada vēdavida rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāhlādanakṛta ramaḷayaśa rmmēdiniyoḷkuṟitakūṁṭeya dvijanicaya .
viditarnnītivida rvvinūtavinayāḷaṁkāra ratyūrjjita rmmadamātsaryyavidūra rādipuruṣa prakhyātiyantāḷi yabhyudayakkā
śriyamādarāvudaṟoḷaṁ dharmajña rāhāradānada peṁpiṭṭaḷamendu mi kuṟitakūṁṭegrāma doḷu dvijar . Aṁtā yinnūrvvarggaṁ saṁtatama
tibhaktiyiṁde nāvida dhōraṁ māṁtanadāgarameni padaguntige nele yādanantu piriyaru moḷare . Ātana taneyaṁ bhuvanakhyātaṁ jātavinū
tavinayānvitanaṁ dātana nabhivarṇnisuvudu bhūtaḷamavanantu jasake nōṁtaru moḷare . tadanuja . śivapādāṁbujabhriṁgaṁ bhu
vanajanastutyananipa nāvida śāntaṁ gavanitaḷaṁ baṇnisutiralavaṁge saviḷāsi dāsanudayaṁ geyda . janahitanayyaṁ śāntaṁ vineyāṁbu
dhi muddiyabbe tāyi tammaṁdirmmanucarita rbammasiṁga rttanageṁdaḍe dāsanēṁ kritārtthano jagadoḷ . dēvadvijagurubhaktaṁ bhūriśrutakī
rtti yenipa nāvida dāsaṁ dēvādhidēvabhavanamanī vasudhege tiḷakamāgira lmāḍisida . Ā sāgaramaṁ dāṁḍi mahīsuteyaṁ kaṇḍu laṁkeyaṁ su
ṭṭa mahāsāsiganenalinnūrvara pēsaṇa hanumaṁtanenipa nāvida dāsa . Ātana māḍida dharmma kkātatayaśarenisi negardda mōri
yavaṁśar prītiyoḷe kūrttu koṭṭar khyāta(ṁ) rcaṁdrārkkatāra mādaradiṁda . nirmmaḷaguṇanidhi jasada tavarmmaneyene peṁpuvetta
barmmaṁ nirmmisuvallige kartt® sudharmmānvitananisi negarddanī vasumatiyoḷ . sthiravākyaṁ keḷegeyvenallanamadaṁ saṁgrāmadhaurēya
nurbbareyoḷnannige janmabhūmi kisuvāyāmnāyabhāḷasthaḷīvaraśōbhākaramālalāma matidurvvṛttārimattēbhakēsari yinnū
rvvarasiṁga vātanesevaynūrvvargge gandhadvipaṁ . śivabhaktaṁ strījanakkaṁgaja nasativadhū tyajya naṁhōvidūraṁ bhuva
nakkārādhyaviprōttamakuḷatiḷakaṁ satyavārāsi yatyugravirōdhibrātasaṁhārakasubhaṭaśikhā Thatna māgiḻdanendiṁtavanī
cakraṁ karaṁ kīrttisutire negarddaṁ dēvanārāvadēva . dharmmada dāna dārppina tavarmmane sarvvajanōpakāritakkūrmmeya janmabhū
mi subhaṭāgraṇi mōriyavaṁśamaṇḍanaṁ nirmmaḷa mopputirppa tiḷakaṁ sale bhāvise gujjagētaniṁ dhārmmikarāru mattuḷidareṁbudu
vārddhiparītabhotaḷaṁ . vṛtta . nijabandhubrajakāmadhēnu vinayāṁbhōrāśi śauryyōrjji taṁ sujanaṁ satyado ḷaṁbujapriyatanū
jaṁ dēvatābhaktiyoḷ trijagaddvandya nanindhya bāṇa namadantāṁ dēsigarggeyde tāyajitaṁ taṁbuligāgragaṇya nadhika nnāgaṁ mahībhāga
doḷ . śivabhaktaṁ vīrāgraṇi gavaṟegaḷābharaṇa makhiḷadēsigarggellaṁ bhuvanadoḷeṁduṁ tāyi bhūbhuvanōttamananisi gavaṟe muddaṁ
negaḻda . kaliballāḷene saṁdasūdrakamahārājaṁ jagatpūjya natyūrjjitakāḷa sēna namadaṁ koṇḍaṁ pracaṇḍaṁ driḍhaṁ baḷavadvikra
maśāḷi boppulaninī nāḍaṁkakāṟaṁ mahītaḷadoḷ tānadhikaṁ vicāripaḍe bhāvaṁ vikramāḷaṁ krita . manasijanenisuva subagadu
tanage nijaṁ vikramakramōnnatiyoḷa marjjunana samaneḍava basavani nanurāgade sakaḷadhātri baṇnisutirkku . jaragara vajrapaṁjara ma
rātibhayaṁkara nēkavākyanī dhareyo ḷagaṇyapuṇyanidhi dēsigarāśraya nunnatānvayaṁ smaranibha suṁdarāṁga nakaḷaṁkacaritra napā
rapauruṣaṁ karaṁdara bācigaṁ kuṟitakūṁṭeya viprara gandhavāraṇa . bēliyakētanuṁ subhaṭa kūlegagētanu vatyudāramaṁ pāli
pa bālagabbe sujanōttamanappa vaijanuṁ śrīlalanāṁganāramaṇanappa kaḍaṁbara kāḷimayyanuṁ mēlenisiḻda dharmmiganu vūrjjita
hiccagagētanintivar . Amayarakētanuṁ negaḻda mācanuvaggada gujjagētanuṁ goravara ciṇnanuṁ gavaṟerēvanu māyereyabbeyā
ycanuṁ paramaparōpakāriyene saṁda negartteya huggedāsanuṁ sthiranene mikkanāgavaṟe mudda nuvūrjjita naṁkimayyanu .
gaṁgarasana bīranu vuttuṁgayaśōbhāgi yeḍavabasavayyanumā gaṁgaracāvuṇḍanumaṁ gaṁgā dharabhaktanenipa mālarakalla . koḍagara kētaṁ
paḍavaḷarareyammaṁ mikkadāni gaḍiyarasiṁgaṁ toḍarddaragāḷaṁ keṁcaṁ poḍaviyo ḷutkriṣṭa barmmikabbeyarāva . nāḍaṁkakā
ṟabāvaṁ rūḍiya kontada cavuṇḍananupamavibhavaṁ nōḍā kajjaṭasattiganōḍade saṁgaradoḷiṟiva taṁbuligaṟaka . jakkayyana kē
taṁ bīrakkāgaramenipa rāceyammana mallaṁ takkaṁ sāguḷagēsi jagakkoḷpaṁ mārppanenipa naṇvara nāga . harivanajayadēvaṁ sa
tpuruṣāgraṇi yenipa māramayyana ballaṁ sthiranā rakkasagētaṁ karuvara sāṁtayyaneseva bāri ka bīca . dēhārada nāganu vutsā
hada naleyenisi negaḻdhadēvagicaṭṭaṁ bāhubaḷadiṁde jīvipa sāhasiga rmmōriyānvaya rkkēvaḷamē . mōriyakulatiḷaka rvvā
ksārateyoḷ piriyarenipa sāsirvvaruvastārātidāsigaṁ vistāradi māḍida śivālaya kkādaradiṁ . nelanuṁ nēsaṟumu
ḷḷina valaghubaḷaṟdōṇidōṇigaḷgoppaṇamaṁ sale varṣaṁprati koṭṭarppalariḻdoṁdāgi māḍe tīraduduṁṭe . matta .
talligacāvanuṁ tadanujaṁ sujanāgraṇi dēvapayyanuṁ sallalitāṁganāharatiyūrjjitanuttamanappa sāntanuṁ kallakaraṁgaḷaṁ
nuḍiyadoḷḷida nārppina hayveseṭṭiyuṁ pollame tannalillenipa kōṇeyavaṁśaja nāytavarmanuṁ . kārasa holla
nuṁ negardda vīraśikhāmaṇi kannamayyanuṁ bhāratamallaniṁdadhikarappa negartteya kōṇeyānvayar śrīramaṇīpri
yaṁ subhaṭagētanu mantavaraṇna caṭṭanuṁ sūrajanastutaṁ sujanajakkanu maggada guṇḍamayyanuṁ . navilara barmmaṁ maruḷaṁ
bhuvanastutarenisu vayvatokkalu matyutsavadiṁ dāsana māḍida śivabhavana kkittareṇneyaṁ soṁṭigeya . paramaparōpa
kārada tavarmmane mōriyavaṁśajargge tāyi paramapadābjabhriṁga suradhēnu samastasuhri jjanakke tāṁ duritavido
re dēsigaradāyi piriduṁ guṇadāgaraṁgaḷeṁ diradabhivarṇnikuṁ janacayaṁ sale pōriya jakki kabbeya . sakavarṣaṁ 1009
neya prabhava saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa damāvāsye Ādityavāraṁ sarvvagrāsisūryagrahaṇaṁ vya tīpātada tātāḷika
doḷ jaragaradōṇisāsirvvaruṁ telligarayvatokkaluṁ śrīmatmābalēśvaradēvarapratibaddha dakṣiṇasōmanāthaṁ
nāvidadāsayyana māḍida dāsēśvara dēvaraṁgabhōga nivēdyanandādīvigegavācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ koṭṭa rmmattaṁ śrī
madagrahāraṁ kuṟitakūṁṭeyūroḍeyapramukha vaśēṣamahājana vinnūrvvaru vūriṁ teṁka muḻguṁdada
dāriyiṁ paḍuva kommarājana śatradekeyya teṁkaṇa poreya bhagavatīdēviya keyya paḍuvaṇa poreya li
rppattanālkugēṇa kōloḷ dēva raṁgabhōga nivēdyaṁ nandādīvigegesarvvabādhāparihāraṁ sarvvanamasyamāgi bi
ṭṭa mattar 5 nāvidadāsimayyaṁ tanna sarvvamānyaṁ baḍagavāgilamaneyo ḷīśānyada gōṁṭinoḷ dēva raṁgabhōga nivēdya
kke koṭṭa kaiyeraḍu yintī dharmmamanārorvva rkkādu naḍasidaravargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ prayāge yarggya
tīrtthaṁ gaṁgāsāgarameṁba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāsirakavileyaṁ kōḍukoḷagumaṁ paṁca ratsaṁgaḷoḷ kaṭṭisi mahā
ritvijargga ḷgubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku madanaḷidaninitumanaḷidu narakaṁbokka paṁcama hāpātakanakkuṁ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . svaṁ dātuṁ
sumahacchakyaṁ duḥkhamanyasya sāḷanaṁ dānaṁ vā pāḷavaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupāḷanaṁ . parahita
rinnūrvvara padasarasīruhāmōdamadhukaraṁ śivabhaktaṁ karavatiśayamāgire vistaradiṁ ku
ḷakaraṇi mābaḷāryyaṁ baredaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
